steps.t: We made our way to shore with the intent of beaching the Corsairs there. I remember how the sea air smelled as we rowed ashore....
My orders were clear, find the launches, scuttle them and return forthwith. It was a take not without danger, but the risk was clear....
The Corsair's ruse worked too well. While we came ashore they assaulted the Nenglor. I returned to the spot where we landed and stared at our launches…
